summary: Bug fix verified: Contacts now showing in delegation tab's contact picker. The fix added auto-discovery of contact sources via /api/sync/contact-sources endpoint. Dashboard correctly loads 13,803 contacts (deduplicated from 41,805 raw contacts) from the device with the most synced contacts (android_42912ae0fb5aeb68).
critical_code_review_comments: Contact auto-discovery logic in dashboard.html (lines 247-270) correctly fetches from /api/sync/contact-sources and uses the device with most contacts
Contact deduplication works correctly - 41,805 raw contacts reduced to 13,803 unique contacts
localStorage is used to cache the contact source device_id for future sessions
Both Add Employee modal and New Reminder modal contact pickers work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact picker bug is fixed. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_contact_sources.py cover the new /api/sync/contact-sources endpoint. Dashboard correctly auto-discovers contacts from mobile-synced device when web user has no contacts.

GET /api/sync/contact-sources.details: Returns list of device_ids with contact counts, sorted by count descending. Returns [{device_id: 'android_42912ae0fb5aeb68', count: 41805}]

GET /api/sync/contacts/{device_id}.details: Returns contacts for given device_id with search and limit parameters. Correctly returns 41,805 total contacts for android device.

GET /api/dashboard.details: Serves updated dashboard.html with contact auto-discovery code

Web dashboard login flow.details: Login with dashtest@example.com and PIN 1234 works correctly

Delegation tab contacts banner.details: Shows 'Contacts loaded: 13,803' banner with 'Source: Mobile Device' indicator

Add Employee modal contact search.details: Typing in name field shows dropdown with matching contacts. Selecting contact auto-fills phone number.

New Reminder modal contact search.details: Contact search dropdown works in reminder modal as well

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Contacts not showing up in delegation tab's contact picker when adding employees
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: device_id mismatch between mobile-synced contacts and web-authenticated users
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added auto-discovery of contact sources via /api/sync/contact-sources endpoint and updated dashboard.html to auto-load contacts from the device with the most synced contacts
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Contacts now load correctly (13,803 contacts) and contact picker works in both Add Employee and New Reminder modals
